company.name: American Innovations Group
company.summary: American Innovations Group builds quote-based hardware, software, cybersecurity, industrial, and technical solutions for customers with real specifications.
company.positioning: Practical engineering for custom hardware, software, and security-focused solutions—scoped carefully around customer requirements, approved quotes, and clean delivery.
company.locationMode: Online-first service with local support capability.

phase.name: Quote-First Engineering
phase.summary: Public quote and product flow for customer-defined technology requirements.

categories.name: Embedded systems
categories.description: Controllers, PCBs, hardware interfaces, signal tools, and electronics-centered builds.

categories.name: Industrial equipment
categories.description: Motor systems, cooling, controls, apparatus planning, and rugged technical support.

categories.name: Manufacturing equipment
categories.description: Build-ready hardware planning, sourcing paths, fixtures, control modules, and production support.

categories.name: Software solutions
categories.description: Automation, dashboards, APIs, customer workflows, internal tools, and hardware-supporting software.

categories.name: Cybersecurity solutions
categories.description: Authorized security audits, scoped penetration testing, security tooling, and defensive software support.

audiences.title: Makers
audiences.description: Builder-friendly support, project planning, documentation, and technical direction for hands-on development.

audiences.title: Tech Hobbyists
audiences.description: Retro-inspired tools, experimental builds, and education-focused content for people who learn by building.

audiences.title: Small Businesses
audiences.description: Affordable automation, workflow cleanup, technical tooling, and support without enterprise bloat.

audiences.title: Industry Professionals
audiences.description: Embedded system planning, industrial support, low-downtime technical solutions, and productization guidance.

products.name: Custom Electric Motors
products.description: Electric motors built or sourced around customer-defined specifications, including voltage, torque, RPM, size constraints, shaft style, mounting needs, duty cycle, and operating environment.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us voltage, torque, RPM, size limits, shaft style, mounting pattern, quantity, duty cycle, and operating environment.

products.name: Control PCB for NEMA Stepper Motors
products.description: Control PCB planning for NEMA stepper motor applications, including driver selection, control inputs, power requirements, protection considerations, and integration planning.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us motor size, current/voltage requirements, controller interface, expected load, quantity, and enclosure constraints.

products.name: Water Cooling Blocks
products.description: Custom or application-specific water cooling block planning for electronics, prototypes, industrial equipment, and thermal management experiments.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us heat source, dimensions, flow path needs, material preference, fittings, coolant, quantity, and mounting requirements.

products.name: PCB Design for Customer Applications
products.description: PCB design support for customer applications, prototypes, embedded builds, controller boards, sensor modules, adapters, and product proof-of-concepts.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us board purpose, components, size limits, I/O, voltage/current, quantity, timeline, and whether you need schematics, layout, or fabrication files.

products.name: Stepper Motor Controller
products.description: Stepper motor controller planning and build support for motion projects, machine interfaces, automation concepts, and embedded control systems.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us axis count, motor type, power requirements, control method, enclosure needs, feedback/sensor requirements, and expected environment.

products.name: Software Solutions
products.description: Software solutions for dashboards, automation, workflow tools, internal utilities, technical interfaces, and hardware-supporting applications.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the workflow, users, must-have features, platform, integrations, timeline, and whether the software supports hardware or internal operations.

products.name: Technical Consulting
products.description: Technical consulting for hardware concepts, embedded systems, manufacturing planning, software decisions, architecture reviews, and project direction.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the problem, current stage, constraints, timeline, budget range if known, and what decision or deliverable you need help with.

products.name: Scientific Apparatus
products.description: Scientific apparatus planning for lab-style prototypes, measurement setups, experimental tooling, fixtures, control systems, and research-support hardware.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the experiment/application, required measurements, environmental constraints, materials, controls, timeline, and documentation needs.

products.name: Signal Analyzer
products.description: Embedded signal analysis concept for lawful lab testing, electronics diagnostics, education, and authorized security research. Designed for legitimate analysis workflows only.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the signal types, lawful test environment, measurement goals, interfaces, bandwidth needs, and project constraints.
products.complianceNote: For lawful testing, owned equipment, lab diagnostics, education, and authorized research only.

products.name: Cybersecurity Consultation and Strategy
products.description: General cybersecurity consulting for individuals, students, creators, small businesses, and technical teams that need direction, planning, or security guidance.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the environment, goals, current concerns, user count, account/platform scope, timeline, and what decisions you need help making.
products.complianceNote: Authorized advisory work only. No unauthorized access, credential theft, or harmful activity.

products.name: Penetration Testing and Security Audit
products.description: Authorized security testing for systems, websites, applications, networks, and business environments before attackers can exploit weaknesses.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the authorized scope, testing window, rules of engagement, target type, business goals, reporting needs, and approval contact.
products.complianceNote: Written authorization and rules of engagement are required before any testing.

products.name: Vulnerability Assessment
products.description: Lower-cost review focused on identifying, prioritizing, and explaining vulnerabilities without deep exploitation.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the systems, websites, devices, or accounts to review, ownership/authorization, and reporting expectations.
products.complianceNote: Authorized systems only. Exploitation depth must be agreed in writing.

products.name: Digital Forensics and Incident Response
products.description: Investigation and triage support for suspicious activity, compromised accounts, unusual device behavior, exposed credentials, and security incidents.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us what happened, affected accounts/devices, timeline, available evidence, urgency, and legal/evidence-handling needs.
products.complianceNote: Legal-sensitive matters may require certified forensic or legal professionals.

products.name: Windows and Linux Hardening
products.description: Security hardening for Windows 11 systems, Linux desktops, Kali lab systems, servers, and development machines.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the operating systems, device count, user roles, current risks, and whether the work is personal, lab, or business-focused.
products.complianceNote: Hardening recommendations depend on ownership, business needs, and backup readiness.

products.name: Network and Wi-Fi Security Review
products.description: Review of routers, Wi-Fi configuration, segmentation, exposed services, firewall posture, guest networks, and small-business or home-lab topology.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the network size, router/Wi-Fi setup, ownership, business goals, and whether segmentation or monitoring is needed.
products.complianceNote: Authorized networks only. No testing against third-party networks.

products.name: Secure Software and GitHub Security Review
products.description: Security-focused review of codebases, GitHub repositories, scripts, websites, and project workflows.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us repository size, language stack, deployment path, whether secrets were exposed, and your release timeline.
products.complianceNote: Repository access must be authorized by the owner or maintainer.

products.name: Git Hygiene and Secret Prevention Setup
products.description: Focused setup for preventing accidental leaks of API keys, tokens, private files, credentials, and sensitive data in Git repositories.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the repository platform, number of repos, current secret-scanning status, and whether cleanup guidance is needed.
products.complianceNote: Do not send secrets for review. Rotate exposed secrets before remediation work.

products.name: Cloud, Account, and Identity Security Review
products.description: Review of MFA, recovery options, access permissions, admin roles, email security, cloud sharing, and account-security basics.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the platforms, user count, admin roles, MFA status, and business/personal account goals.
products.complianceNote: Customers must own or administer the reviewed accounts.

products.name: Purple-Team Lab Design and Training Environment Setup
products.description: Design support for safe red-team/blue-team labs used for learning, testing, detection engineering, and cybersecurity education.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the student/business purpose, hardware, virtualization setup, network layout, and safe testing boundaries.
products.complianceNote: Training labs must be isolated and authorized.

products.name: Detection Engineering Starter Package
products.description: Starter package for basic detection logic, logging workflows, and defensive monitoring structure.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the environment, log sources, defensive goals, lab/business context, and reporting needs.
products.complianceNote: Defensive monitoring only. Data sources must be authorized.

products.name: Security Documentation and Policy Development
products.description: Professional security documents for individuals, students, startups, and small businesses building security maturity.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the documents needed, organization type, audience, policy requirements, and timeline.
products.complianceNote: Policy templates are guidance documents and are not legal advice.

products.name: Security Awareness Training
products.description: Practical cybersecurity training for non-technical users, students, employees, and small teams.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the audience, group size, preferred topics, technical level, and delivery format.
products.complianceNote: Training is educational and defensive only.

products.name: Cybersecurity Tutoring for Students
products.description: One-on-one or small-group tutoring for cybersecurity concepts, labs, assignments, portfolios, Linux, networking, Python, and ethical hacking basics.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us the class/topic, current skill level, goals, timeline, and whether the support is for labs, portfolio, CTF, or capstone planning.
products.complianceNote: Tutoring is educational and ethical. It does not include cheating, bypassing school systems, or unauthorized activity.

products.name: OSINT, Scam Documentation, and Reporting Support
products.description: Support for documenting scams, suspicious online behavior, public-source findings, and report-ready evidence packets.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us what happened, what public evidence exists, what platforms are involved, and what report output is needed.
products.complianceNote: No doxxing, harassment, stalking, unauthorized access, or illegal surveillance.

products.name: OPSEC Checklist Template
products.description: Structured operational-security checklist for identity separation, alias tracking, account hygiene, device security, browser hygiene, metadata awareness, and social media safety.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need a customized version for personal, student, creator, or business use.
products.complianceNote: Template guidance only. Does not guarantee anonymity or legal protection.

products.name: Security Audit Template
products.description: Professional template for documenting assets, risks, vulnerabilities, controls, findings, impact, likelihood, remediation status, and follow-up actions.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need a customized branded version.
products.complianceNote: Template only. Professional judgment is required for real audits.

products.name: Penetration Test Scope and Report Template
products.description: Documentation package including authorization, scope, rules of engagement, methodology, findings format, risk ratings, remediation tracking, and final report structure.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need a custom branded version for a class, portfolio, or small consulting workflow.
products.complianceNote: Template does not authorize testing. Written permission is still required.

products.name: Small Business Cyber Defense Starter Kit
products.description: Bundled checklist and implementation package for small businesses that need practical security without enterprise complexity.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need implementation support or a customized version.
products.complianceNote: Digital kit is guidance; implementation support is quoted separately.

products.name: Windows and Linux Hardening Playbook
products.description: Step-by-step defensive hardening guide for Windows 11 and Linux systems.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need a custom environment version.
products.complianceNote: Guidance must be adapted to your environment and backup plan.

products.name: GitHub Security Hygiene Kit
products.description: Security kit for developers and students publishing code online, including gitignore, secret scanning, pre-commit checks, and release-readiness notes.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you want a walkthrough or repository setup.
products.complianceNote: Do not include secrets in support requests.

products.name: Purple-Team Lab Blueprint
products.description: Safe lab-design blueprint for ethical hacking, blue-team monitoring, CTF training, and cybersecurity portfolio development.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need a custom lab design.
products.complianceNote: Labs should be isolated and used only for authorized learning.

products.name: Incident Response Binder
products.description: Practical incident response packet for individuals and small businesses with intake forms, timelines, evidence checklists, recovery steps, and post-incident review.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need a customized business binder.
products.complianceNote: Not a substitute for legal counsel or certified forensic services.

products.name: Cybersecurity Student Roadmap Pack
products.description: Student-focused roadmap for learning cybersecurity, building labs, documenting projects, improving GitHub, preparing for CTFs, and developing a portfolio.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need a custom student plan.
products.complianceNote: Educational support only. Does not include dishonest academic assistance.

products.name: Secure Software Launch Checklist
products.description: Pre-release security checklist for websites, small apps, APIs, scripts, and public GitHub projects.
products.quotePrompt: Tell us if you need a custom launch review.
products.complianceNote: Checklist guidance only; production review may require a quoted service.

services.title: Hardware + Embedded Systems
services.description: Prototype planning, controller boards, embedded device support, component sourcing, enclosure planning, and deployment guidance.

services.title: Industrial + Manufacturing Support
services.description: Motor systems, water cooling blocks, apparatus support, controls, fixtures, and quote-based manufacturing direction.

services.title: Software Solutions
services.description: Dashboards, automation, workflow tooling, quote intake systems, internal utilities, and platform/API planning.

services.title: Technical Consulting
services.description: Architecture reviews, sourcing strategies, feasibility reviews, cost/risk planning, and technical roadmap support.

services.title: Cybersecurity Solutions
services.description: Authorized security audits, scoped penetration testing, defensive tooling, security documentation, and custom software support.

btc.notice: BTC checkout starts as a manual invoice flow after a quote is approved. No private keys, seed phrases, or wallet credentials are stored in this website.

resources.title: Small Business Security Checklist
resources.description: Start with MFA, password manager adoption, backups, update hygiene, account recovery review, and clear incident reporting steps.

resources.title: GitHub Security Hygiene
resources.description: Use gitignore rules, secret scanning, branch protection where appropriate, and pre-release checks before publishing code.

resources.title: Student Cybersecurity Roadmap
resources.description: Build a safe lab, document projects, practice CTFs ethically, learn Linux/networking basics, and publish clean writeups.

resources.title: Incident Response First Steps
resources.description: Preserve evidence, change passwords from a clean device, enable MFA, document the timeline, and avoid deleting artifacts too early.
